items.briefing:
Australian organisations are facing several active threats today. The ACSC has warned that login credentials for Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways have been exposed — if your organisation uses these products, passwords should be changed immediately. Separately, INC ransomware attacks are increasing, with Australian targets remaining a focus, and a Cloudflare report confirms rising cyberattacks against Australian civil society groups.

Salesforce users should also be aware of ongoing data theft linked to a compromised third-party app called Klue, which may affect organisations using connected tools.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses Fortinet VPN or firewall products, contact your IT team today to confirm credentials have been rotated and multi-factor authentication is enabled.

featured.title: ACSC warns of reported credential exposure affecting Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways
featured.quote: ACSC warns of widespread credential exposure affecting critical infrastructure firewalls nationwide.
